title: Remove OpenSearch runtime/config/dependency references
description:
Remove remaining OpenSearch runtime/config/dependency references from the feature path.

Scope:
- code paths and clients
- env/config keys
- dependency entries
- docs/templates/scripts references

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: 2026-03-06 09:18 ET: OpenSearch cleanup implemented. Removed OpenSearch client + tests (plexus/analysis/opensearch_client.py, plexus/analysis/opensearch_client_test.py), removed CDK context flag @aws-cdk/aws-opensearchservice:enableOpensearchMultiAzWithStandby from infrastructure/cdk.json, and scrubbed OpenSearch mentions from s3vectors_client/topic_clusterer/embedding_cache comments. Repo now has no OpenSearch references outside historical logs.
